about.metaTitle: About KING STUDIO — A real K-pop recording studio in Seoul
about.metaDescription: KING STUDIO has run K-pop recording sessions for visitors in Seoul since 2017 — a direct, studio-first experience featured in The New York Times.

hero.title: A real studio. Your own K-pop track.
hero.subtitle: Since 2017, KING STUDIO has welcomed visitors from around the world into a professional Seoul recording studio — to sing, record, and take home something that is truly theirs.

story.heading: Studio-first, direct
story.body1: We started KING STUDIO in Seongsu, Seoul, with one idea: give visitors the real thing — a professional booth, a vocal director, and a recording that is yours to keep. Over the years we have hosted thousands of sessions, first through travel platforms and now directly through our own site.
story.body2: Going direct means fairer prices, a booking made for you, and a relationship that continues after your session — not a listing lost in an OTA marketplace.

studio.title: A real recording studio
studio.body: Not a photo set or a costume booth — a professional room with engineers and a vocal director.

takeaway.title: Take home your own work
takeaway.body: Your recorded audio and studio photos, delivered by a secure link after your session — plus a physical CD handed to you in the studio that day.

direct.title: Booked directly with us
direct.body: No middleman. Book, pay, and get help straight from the studio.

nyt.label: In the press
nyt.title: Featured in The New York Times
nyt.body: In November 2024, The New York Times wrote about recording K-pop in Seoul — and the experience KING STUDIO offers visitors.

cta.heading: Come record with us
cta.sub: Choose a package and start your session in Seoul.

faq.metaDescription: Answers about KING STUDIO's K-pop recording experience in Seoul: what's included, languages, booking, what you take home, and cancellations.
faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.sub: Everything you need to know before you book your session.

q1.a: A real recording studio in Seoul where you sing a K-pop song with a professional vocal director and take home your own audio and photos.

q2.q: Do I need to be a good singer?
q2.a: Not at all. A vocal director guides you through every take — the experience is made for beginners and fans, not just singers.

q3.q: What languages can I book in?
q3.a: The site is available in Korean, English, Japanese, and Chinese (Traditional), and sessions are guided in English for international visitors.

q4.q: What is included in each package?
q4.a: It depends on the tier — Gold, Diamond, or Premium. All experience packages include studio photos and a CD; Diamond and Premium add a full mix and master, and Premium adds a music video. See Packages for details.

q5.a: Your recorded audio, studio photos, and a CD. Diamond and Premium also include a mixed and mastered version, and Premium a music video. Digital files arrive by a secure link after your session; the CD is handed to you in the studio that day.

q6.a: Gold and Diamond run about two hours; Premium about three.

q7.q: Can I come with friends, family, or a group?
q7.a: Yes. Experience packages take up to five people, and our K-Pop Making Class is designed for larger groups. Minors are welcome with a guardian's consent, which we collect at checkout.

q8.q: When are you open and where are you?
q8.a: We are open every day from 10:00 to 22:00 (KST) in Seongsu, Seoul.

q9.q: How do I book, pay, and cancel?
q9.a: Book online — choose your package, slot, and song — and pay in Korean won (foreign cards and PayPal are supported; other currencies are shown for reference). Free cancellation is available up to a few days before your session, with partial refunds closer to the date; the full policy is shown at checkout.

cta.heading: Still have a question?
cta.sub: Browse packages and songs, or pick a session to get started.

footer.krwNotice: All payments are charged in KRW. Other currencies are shown for reference only; the final rate is set by your card issuer.

step1.title: Choose your package
step1.subtitle: Pick the recording experience you'd like to book.
step1.empty: No bookable packages are available for this language yet.

step2.title: Pick a date and time
step2.subtitle: All times are shown in Korea Standard Time (KST).
step2.windowHint: Bookable from tomorrow up to 90 days ahead.
step2.pickDatePrompt: Select a date to see available times.
step2.loadError: Couldn't load times. Please try again.
step2.noSlots: No open times on this date. Try another day.

step3.title: Options & consent
step3.subtitle: Choose your song and party details, then confirm the required consents.
step3.missingSlot: No date/time selected. Please pick a slot in the previous step first.

headcount.label: Party size
headcount.hint: Choose within the package's allowed range.

song.label: Song
song.rentalNote: Rental packages: you bring your own MR, so no song selection is needed.

reservant.title: Booker details
reservant.name: Name
reservant.hint: Used for payment and your booking confirmation.

participants.title: Participant dates of birth
participants.hint: Enter the date of birth for every participant. If anyone is under 16, guardian consent is required.

guardian.title: Guardian consent
guardian.notice: A participant is under 16. Legal-guardian details and consent are required; checkout is blocked until complete.
guardian.name: Guardian name
guardian.consentLabel: As the legal guardian, I consent to the above minor's booking and participation.

items.tos: I agree to the Terms of Service.
items.privacy: I agree to the collection and use of personal data (items, purpose, retention period).
items.usage_scope: I understand that personal, non-commercial social sharing is free, but commercial use (advertising, monetization, resale, etc.) requires a separate license from the original rights holder, which KING STUDIO does not guarantee.
items.korean_only: I confirm I can communicate comfortably in Korean. (Rental only)
items.license_self_brought: I agree that the usage rights of any MR/audio I bring are mine, and I am responsible for any copyright disputes arising from its use.

marketing.note: Optional. Usage period is 3 years from the date of consent.
marketing.basic: I agree to basic use (our website, official social media, press releases).
marketing.ads: I agree to use in paid digital advertising.
marketing.outdoor: I agree to use in outdoor advertising and print.
marketing.broadcast: I agree to use on TV, OTT, and broadcast.
marketing.email: I agree to receive marketing emails.
marketing.sms: I agree to receive marketing SMS.

errors.dob_missing: Enter a date of birth for every participant.
errors.reservant_missing: Enter the booker's name and email.
errors.guardian_incomplete: Complete all guardian details and consent.

step4.title: Payment
step4.subtitle: Review your booking, agree to the payment terms, and complete your payment.
step4.missingDraft: No booking details found. Please complete the options step first.

summary.title: Booking summary
summary.cdNote: Your CD (the day’s session master) is handed over on-site at the studio when your session ends.

step4.currencyNotice: You are billed in KRW. The amount converted to your home currency depends on your card issuer’s exchange rate, and the PG fee is included in the charge.

pg.title: Payment method
pg.feeInicis: Local cards · Naver Pay · Kakao Pay · PG fee approx. 3.0%

consent.title: Pre-payment consent
consent.payment: I agree to the payment terms (KRW billing, card-issuer FX difference, PG fee included) and the refund policy. (required)

errors.invalid_params: Some details are invalid. Please review the previous steps.
